Mtn To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S 1st Amended Complt & Req For Order Requiring Payment Of Deft'S Expenses
Off Calendar Jun-02-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT JOSEPH ZADEH'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's FirstAmended Complaint And Request For Order Requiring Payment Of Defendant's Expenses: DENIED. Order Requiring Payment Of Expenses is DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2004 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT JOSEPH ZADEH'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT: OVERRULED with 10 days leave to answer from date of notice of entry of order. The request to impose monetary conditions on the filing of an amended complaint is DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Motion For Appointment Of Receiver
Off Calendar May-03-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE: MARK W. EPSTEIN, ESQ. OF SEILER, EPSTEIN, ET AL, FOR PLAINITFF/MOVING PARTY, MAJID KAZEMIAN
JOHN K. KAO, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT, JOSEPH ZADEH

ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS;
PLAINTIFF MAJID KAZEMIAN'S Motion For Appointment Of Receiver: GRANTED. MR. KAO, COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT, JOSEPH ZADEH, WILL SELECT THREE PEOPLE AND PROVIDE THEM TO MR EPSTEIN, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF, MAJID KAZEMIAN, BY 5/7/04. MR. EPSTEIN WILL CHOOSE ONE PERSON FROM THE THREE. THE COURT WILL APPOINT THE RECEIVER. (301/JLW/EH) REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR: 1558
